narrative:
Green (precinct in Clinton County) has 983 registered voters, with 50.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.1 percentage points.
